name: Bookgallery
shortDescription: Bookgallery is a dynamic website that offers a unique reading and writing experience. As a user, you have the opportunity to explore a vast library of novels written by talented authors.
description:
Bookgallery is a dynamic website that offers a unique reading and writing experience. As a user, you have the opportunity to explore a vast library of novels written by talented authors.

One of the standout features of Bookgallery is the Paid Story program. For aspiring writers, this feature allows you to not only showcase your creative work but also earn money for your talent. Every time someone reads your novel, you receive compensation, creating a mutually beneficial relationship between authors and readers.

Bookgallery also provides a platform for publishers to collaborate with writers. Publishers can register and upload novels owned by their writers, expanding their reach and providing an additional avenue for promotion. This collaborative approach fosters a supportive and vibrant community where writers can gain exposure and reach a wider audience.

To make reading on the go even more convenient, Bookgallery offers a mobile app available for download on Google Play and the App Store. With the app, you can access your favorite novels anytime, anywhere, ensuring that you never have to be without captivating stories at your fingertips.

But the benefits don't stop there! Bookgallery also offers an affiliate program, allowing users to invite others to join the platform using their unique affiliation code. By sharing Bookgallery with friends and acquaintances, you have the opportunity to earn money through the affiliate program. This incentivizes word-of-mouth promotion and creates a sense of community within the platform.

Bookgallery is not just a website; it's a thriving ecosystem that supports writers, publishers, and avid readers. Whether you're a passionate storyteller looking to earn from your craft or a voracious reader in search of captivating novels, Bookgallery is the perfect destination to connect, explore, and immerse yourself in the world of literature. Join us today and embark on a journey filled with literary delights!

name: Novelindo
shortDescription: Novelindo is a versatile platform where you can discover and purchase novels in both physical and digital formats. Whether you prefer the tactile experience of holding a physical book or the convenience of reading on your device, Novelindo has got you covered.
description:
Novelindo is a versatile platform where you can discover and purchase novels in both physical and digital formats. Whether you prefer the tactile experience of holding a physical book or the convenience of reading on your device, Novelindo has got you covered.

If you choose to buy a digital novel, you can dive straight into the captivating stories within the website itself. With just a few clicks, you'll have access to a vast library of digital novels, ready to be enjoyed at your leisure. It's a seamless and immersive reading experience, all within the Novelindo platform.

Novelindo understands that every customer has unique preferences, which is why we offer a variety of payment methods to suit your convenience. Whether you prefer credit card payments, bank transfers, or popular e-wallet options, Novelindo ensures a hassle-free checkout process.

Once your order is placed, Novelindo takes care of the delivery process as well. We have established partnerships with reliable shipping couriers to ensure that your physical novels reach you safely and efficiently. Sit back and relax as your eagerly awaited novels make their way to your doorstep.

Whether you're an avid reader, a collector, or simply someone who enjoys the thrill of a good story, Novelindo is the perfect destination for all your novel needs. Start exploring our extensive collection today and indulge in the joy of discovering new worlds, unforgettable characters, and captivating narratives.
socialMedia: Novelindo is a versatile platform where you can discover and purchase novels in both physical and digital formats. Whether you prefer the tactile experience of holding a physical book or the convenience of reading on your device, Novelindo has got you covered.

name: Point Break
shortDescription: Welcome to the Point Break app, the ultimate destination for all clothing needs. Users can explore a wide selection of clothing products, including t-shirts, shorts, shoes, sandals, and more, all curated from top brands available exclusively on Point Break.
description:
Welcome to the Point Break app, the ultimate destination for all clothing needs. Users can explore a wide selection of clothing products, including t-shirts, shorts, shoes, sandals, and more, all curated from top brands available exclusively on Point Break.

The Point Break app offers a seamless shopping experience, providing multiple payment options to suit every user's preference. Whether it's credit card payments, bank transfers, or popular e-wallet services, users can securely complete their purchases with ease.

With a focus on timely and reliable delivery, Point Break has partnered with trusted shipping couriers. Users can rest assured that their orders will be promptly delivered to their doorsteps. Additionally, the app allows users to choose the store from which their order will be shipped, providing them with added flexibility and control.

Point Break's membership program enhances the shopping experience even further. Users can seamlessly access exclusive benefits and rewards across the app and physical stores. Upon visiting a Point Break store, users can conveniently present their membership card on the app to unlock special discounts and promotions. Furthermore, for every purchase made, users earn points equivalent to 2.5% of the total purchase value. These points can be redeemed as payment for future purchases, creating added value and appreciation for their loyalty.

The Point Break app is dedicated to providing a personalized and effortless shopping journey. With its extensive range of clothing products, diverse payment options, reliable shipping partners, and rewarding membership program, users can experience convenience, style, and satisfaction all in one place.

name: GOTC App API
shortDescription: The GOTC API, designed specifically for the GOTC app, provides a comprehensive set of functionalities for doctors, nurses, and patients. It serves as the backbone of the app, enabling seamless communication and interaction between these three user groups.
description:
The GOTC API, designed specifically for the GOTC app, provides a comprehensive set of functionalities for doctors, nurses, and patients. It serves as the backbone of the app, enabling seamless communication and interaction between these three user groups.

For doctors, the API offers features such as login and registration, allowing them to securely access their accounts. Additionally, doctors can utilize the API to give prescriptions, accept consultations (both audio and video), provide diagnoses, and perform other relevant tasks essential to their medical practice.

Nurses also benefit from the API's capabilities. They can log in and register, enabling them to manage their accounts efficiently. The API provides features like broadcasting treatment orders to nearby nurses, accepting treatment orders, scheduling treatments, and carrying out various other tasks necessary for their roles in providing quality healthcare.

Patients, the core users of the GOTC app, can utilize the API to access a range of features. By logging in or registering through the API, patients can order over-the-counter drugs, request prescription drugs, schedule online consultations, and even schedule treatments with nurses. This functionality empowers patients to take control of their healthcare and easily access the services they require.

name: Phago App API
shortDescription: The Phago App API serves as a vital component of the innovative Phago app, specifically designed for Medical and Pharmacy students as a supplementary module for their Pharmacology course. The app introduces interactive games that aim to engage and motivate students to study Pharmacology independently.
description:
The Phago App API serves as a vital component of the innovative Phago app, specifically designed for Medical and Pharmacy students as a supplementary module for their Pharmacology course. The app introduces interactive games that aim to engage and motivate students to study Pharmacology independently.

With the Phago App API, students can take advantage of various functionalities that enhance their learning experience. The API provides registration and login features, allowing students to create accounts and securely access the app's content.

The API enables students to retrieve clinics and clinic data, which includes questions, answers, and scores associated with specific topics. This functionality empowers students to test their knowledge, track their progress, and reinforce their understanding of Pharmacology concepts.

Moreover, the API allows users to save their clinic scores, ensuring their achievements are recorded and can be used to monitor their overall performance. Similarly, students can access trivia data, consisting of questions, answers, and scores, providing an additional engaging element to test their knowledge and broaden their understanding of Pharmacology.

To foster a sense of healthy competition, the API offers functionality to retrieve users' ranks, allowing students to see how they compare to their peers in terms of scores and achievements. Additionally, students can retrieve their own user data, enabling them to review their individual progress and statistics within the app.

The Phago App API also provides access to a library feature where students can retrieve books related to Pharmacology, expanding their resources and facilitating further study. Furthermore, students can access detailed information about specific drugs, enhancing their understanding of drug properties, usage, and effects.

name: Jago Jewelry

The website showcases the craftsmanship and beauty of each piece, allowing users to browse and select their desired jewelry with ease.
description:
With the Jago Jewelry website, users can explore a wide variety of jewelry pieces, including stunning rings, elegant necklaces, sparkling earrings, and more. The website showcases the craftsmanship and beauty of each piece, allowing users to browse and select their desired jewelry with ease.

Jago Jewelry understands the importance of flexible payment options. To cater to every user's preferences, the website offers a range of secure payment methods. Whether users prefer credit card payments, bank transfers, or popular e-wallet services, they can complete their transactions seamlessly and confidently.

Shipping is made hassle-free through Jago Jewelry's partnership with reliable shipping couriers. Each shipment is meticulously handled to ensure that your precious jewelry arrives safely and in perfect condition. Every shipment is also accompanied by insurance, providing you with peace of mind and protection for your valuable purchase.

For those who prefer a more personalized experience, the Jago Jewelry website also offers the option to order online and pick up the product in-store. This feature allows users to enjoy the convenience of online shopping while having the opportunity to see and try on their chosen jewelry before finalizing their purchase.

name: PIMC
shortDescription: The PIMC website serves as a comprehensive company profile for Pondok Indah Medical Centre, providing a wealth of information to visitors. This informative website showcases the various clinics available at PIMC, allowing users to explore the diverse range of medical specialties offered.
description:
The PIMC website serves as a comprehensive company profile for Pondok Indah Medical Centre, providing a wealth of information to visitors. This informative website showcases the various clinics available at PIMC, allowing users to explore the diverse range of medical specialties offered.

For each clinic, the website provides detailed profiles of the doctors practicing at PIMC. Users can learn about the qualifications, expertise, and experience of the doctors, helping them make informed decisions when choosing the right healthcare professional for their needs.

In addition to clinic and doctor information, the PIMC website features a collection of health articles, providing valuable insights and resources on various medical topics. Visitors can access this wealth of knowledge, enabling them to stay informed and make educated decisions regarding their health and well-being.

The website also presents the vision and mission of PIMC, outlining the center's commitment to providing high-quality medical care, utilizing advanced technologies, and prioritizing patient satisfaction. This section conveys PIMC's dedication to delivering exceptional healthcare services and reflects their core values.

To facilitate communication and engagement, the PIMC website includes contact information for easy access to their services. Users can find relevant phone numbers, email addresses, and physical addresses, allowing them to reach out to PIMC with inquiries, appointment requests, or any other necessary information.

name: Boccoroco
shortDescription: The Boccoroco website provides users with a delightful platform to explore and purchase a wide range of Boccoroco products, including shoes, sandals, bags, luggage, and much more. With a user-friendly interface, the website offers a seamless and enjoyable shopping experience.
description:
The Boccoroco website provides users with a delightful platform to explore and purchase a wide range of Boccoroco products, including shoes, sandals, bags, luggage, and much more. With a user-friendly interface, the website offers a seamless and enjoyable shopping experience.

To ensure convenience and flexibility, the Boccoroco website supports various secure payment methods. Users can choose their preferred payment option, whether it's credit card payments, bank transfers, or popular e-wallet services, to complete their transactions with ease and confidence.

Shipping is made hassle-free through Boccoroco's collaboration with reliable shipping couriers. Users can expect timely and secure delivery of their purchased products right to their doorstep. Each shipment is handled with care, ensuring that the products arrive in perfect condition.

Boccoroco's affiliate program adds an exciting dimension to the website. Users can invite others to sign up to Boccoroco using their unique affiliate code. In return, they earn promo coupons based on the number of people who join using their affiliate code. This program rewards users for sharing their love for Boccoroco products and helps them enjoy exclusive discounts on their future purchases.

In the event that a desired product is out of stock, the Boccoroco website offers an indent feature. Users can place an indent request to secure their desired item, ensuring that they don't miss out on their preferred choice even if it's temporarily unavailable.

Boccoroco values customer satisfaction and provides a complain and return feature on their website. In the rare instance that a customer is not fully satisfied with their purchase, they can easily communicate their concerns and initiate the return process, ensuring a hassle-free resolution.

name: Duckie Land
shortDescription: The Duckie Land website serves as an informative platform, providing comprehensive details about Duckie Land, a company at the forefront of developing Duckie NFT, Duckie Land Metaverse and game, mmeta token, wafer token, and Duckie Land DAO. This profile company website is a hub of information for users interested in learning more about Duckie Land's exciting ventures.
description:
The Duckie Land website serves as an informative platform, providing comprehensive details about Duckie Land, a company at the forefront of developing Duckie NFT, Duckie Land Metaverse and game, mmeta token, wafer token, and Duckie Land DAO. This profile company website is a hub of information for users interested in learning more about Duckie Land's exciting ventures.

Users can easily register and create an account on the Duckie Land website. During the registration process, a unique Google Authenticator code is generated to ensure secure access to the Duckie Land website. This additional layer of authentication adds an extra level of security for user logins.

Within the Duckie Land user dashboard, users have access to valuable information about their owned assets. This includes details about their Duckie NFTs, land holdings, and farming tools. The dashboard serves as a centralized location for users to manage and track their assets, allowing for efficient asset management.

In addition to asset management, users can also join guilds, fostering a sense of community and collaboration within the Duckie Land ecosystem. By joining guilds, users can engage with like-minded individuals and explore new opportunities within the Duckie Land community.

Breeding duckies is another exciting feature offered by Duckie Land. Users have the option to breed two duckies, resulting in the creation of a new duckie. This unique breeding feature adds a dynamic element to the Duckie Land experience, allowing users to expand their collection and potentially discover rare and valuable duckie variations.

The user dashboard also provides a transaction history log, enabling users to review and track their past transactions within the Duckie Land ecosystem. This feature ensures transparency and allows users to stay updated on their financial activities.

Furthermore, users can manage their profile details directly within the user dashboard, ensuring their information is up to date and accurate.

As Duckie Land continues to evolve, the website will incorporate a marketplace where users can buy and sell Duckie Land NFTs. This marketplace provides users with a platform to engage in the trading and acquisition of unique and valuable assets within the Duckie Land ecosystem.

name: Imaginary World
shortDescription: Welcome to the Imaginary World website, where enthusiasts can stake their Imaginary Ones NFT Collection, including the captivating Imaginary Rides NFT Collection. As a valued member of the development team, I am proud to have contributed to several exciting features that enhance the user experience on this platform.
description:
Welcome to the Imaginary World website, where enthusiasts can stake their Imaginary Ones NFT Collection, including the captivating Imaginary Rides NFT Collection. As a valued member of the development team, I am proud to have contributed to several exciting features that enhance the user experience on this platform.

One of the features I helped develop is the onboard connect wallet modal, which provides a seamless and secure connection between users and their preferred wallet providers. This feature simplifies the process of accessing and managing NFTs, ensuring a smooth and user-friendly onboarding experience.

To keep users informed and engaged, I also worked on the announcement feature within the user dashboard. This allows important updates, news, and events to be communicated directly to users, ensuring they stay up to date with the latest developments in the Imaginary World community.

Additionally, I implemented staking and unstaking confirmation modals, success modals, and error modals. These pop-up notifications provide users with clear and concise information regarding their staking actions, ensuring a transparent and seamless staking process.

The inventory page, another feature I helped build, offers users a comprehensive overview of their NFT holdings. This page allows users to easily navigate and manage their collection, providing a convenient and organized way to explore their Imaginary Ones NFTs and Imaginary Rides NFTs.

The reward and staking page tabs provide users with a dedicated space to monitor their staking progress and potential rewards. These tabs offer valuable insights into users' participation in the staking program, allowing them to track their achievements and enjoy the benefits of being part of the Imaginary World ecosystem.

In the reward page cards, I implemented visually appealing designs that showcase the rewards users can earn through their staking activities. These cards provide users with enticing previews of the rewards they can unlock, creating excitement and motivation to continue staking.

To enhance user understanding and engagement, I also worked on information modals and reward filters. These features provide users with additional details about the staking program and allow them to filter and explore specific types of rewards, empowering them to make informed decisions.

Furthermore, I played a key role in the development of the link and unlink pages, which enable users to conveniently connect and disconnect their wallets. This functionality ensures seamless integration with various wallet providers, providing users with flexibility and ease of use.

Finally, I assisted in testing the entire website's functionality, ensuring a smooth and error-free user experience. By diligently testing each feature and identifying and resolving any issues, I helped create a reliable platform that users can trust.

name: Imaginary Rides
shortDescription: The Imaginary Rides website is a dedicated platform where users can explore and engage with the latest NFT collection from Imaginary Ones. With the features I developed, such as the immersive three.js-powered homepage and the user-friendly deposit page with differentiated whitelisting options, users can fully immerse themselves in the world of Imaginary Rides and secure their place in this extraordinary NFT experience.
description:
The Imaginary Rides website is a dedicated platform where users can explore and engage with the latest NFT collection from Imaginary Ones. With the features I developed, such as the immersive three.js-powered homepage and the user-friendly deposit page with differentiated whitelisting options, users can fully immerse themselves in the world of Imaginary Rides and secure their place in this extraordinary NFT experience.

In the development of the Imaginary Rides website, I had the opportunity to contribute to several key features that enhance the user experience and bring the Imaginary Rides NFT collection to life.

One of the significant features I worked on was the homepage using three.js, an innovative technology that allows for immersive and interactive experiences. Within the homepage, users will encounter three distinct parts representing Imaginary Rides Land, Imaginary Rides Air, and Imaginary Rides Sea. Each section showcases the unique NFT collections associated with these themes, giving users a glimpse into the captivating world of Imaginary Rides.

Additionally, I played a pivotal role in the development of the deposit page. This page provides users with a convenient platform to secure their spot in the Imaginary Rides NFT collection by making an ETH payment based on the desired quantity of spots they wish to claim. The deposit page features two main sections: one for users whitelisted in the FCFS Whitelist, and another for those whitelisted in the VIP Whitelist.

For users whitelisted in the FCFS Whitelist, spots are limited to 1000 on a first-come, first-serve basis. If all 1000 spots are filled, users will still have the option to deposit for a non-guaranteed spot. On the other hand, VIP whitelist participants are guaranteed their spots, regardless of availability, and can also opt to deposit for non-guaranteed spots. Non-guaranteed spots will be automatically upgraded to guaranteed spots if there are still 10,000 total spots available for deposit.

name: IO Garage, IO Spehere, IO Ride Smart Contract
shortDescription: Imaginary Garage, Imaginary Sphere, and Imaginary Ride are a set of trial smart contracts developed for the latest collections from Imaginary Ones. As a co-writer of these smart contracts, I helped bring innovative features to life, enabling a seamless and engaging experience for users.
description:
Imaginary Garage, Imaginary Sphere, and Imaginary Ride are a set of trial smart contracts developed for the latest collections from Imaginary Ones. As a co-writer of these smart contracts, I helped bring innovative features to life, enabling a seamless and engaging experience for users.

The Imaginary Garage smart contract is an ERC721A smart contract developed as a trial for the latest collection from Imaginary Ones. In co-writing this smart contract, we aimed to create an efficient and secure platform for users to claim their spots within the collection.

This smart contract offers users the ability to claim their spots through two distinct features. The first is the free mint option, which allows whitelisted users to mint an Imaginary Garage NFT without any payment. Users who are granted access to the free mint feature can claim their Imaginary Garage NFTs based on the quantity they are eligible for.

Additionally, the smart contract includes a public mint feature, available to all users. Through this feature, users can mint Imaginary Garage NFTs by paying a specific amount of ETH. The public mint feature opens up the opportunity for a wider audience to participate in the collection.

Furthermore, the Imaginary Garage smart contract incorporates a reveal Garage function. This function enables users to reveal their Garage NFTs, triggering the minting of Imaginary Rides and Imaginary Sphere NFTs. The quantity of Imaginary Rides and Imaginary Sphere NFTs minted is determined randomly based on the user's reveal, adding an element of surprise and excitement to the collection.

The Imaginary Rides smart contract, an ERC721 smart contract, was co-written to support the minting of Imaginary Rides NFTs. This smart contract serves as the foundation for the creation and distribution of these unique NFTs within the Imaginary Ones ecosystem.

The Imaginary Sphere smart contract, based on the ERC1155 upgradeable standard, was developed to mint Imaginary Sphere NFTs. This smart contract enables the creation of these special NFTs, providing users with a diverse and captivating selection to enhance their Imaginary Ones collection.

name: Imaginary Rides Smart Contract
shortDescription: The Imaginary Rides smart contract is an ERC721A standard contract specifically developed for the latest NFT collection from Imaginary Ones. As a co-writer of this smart contract, I have played a key role in implementing various features that enhance the functionality and engagement of the collection.
description:
The Imaginary Rides smart contract is an ERC721A standard contract specifically developed for the latest NFT collection from Imaginary Ones. As a co-writer of this smart contract, I have played a key role in implementing various features that enhance the functionality and engagement of the collection.

One of the primary features of the Imaginary Rides smart contract is the ability for users to deposit their spots. The contract includes two distinct deposit functionalities: one for VIP participants and another for those participating in the First-Come, First-Serve (FCFS) program. VIP participants are provided with a guaranteed spot, regardless of availability, while FCFS participants have the opportunity to secure a spot on a first-come, first-serve basis.

In addition to the deposit features, the smart contract facilitates batch airdrops for both deposit spots and treasures. Through these batch airdrop mechanisms, participants are rewarded with their allocated NFTs, ensuring a fair distribution of the Imaginary Rides collection. The smart contract also includes provisions for Imaginary Ones Holders and gift functionality, allowing for special rewards and surprises to be shared with eligible participants.

Furthermore, the Imaginary Rides smart contract incorporates a batch airdrop specifically designed for winners of the Bubble Rider competition. This feature enables the seamless distribution of NFT rewards to the deserving winners, showcasing their achievements within the Imaginary Rides ecosystem.

To ensure transparency and user satisfaction, the smart contract also includes a batch refund feature. This feature is activated when users have deposited funds but, due to limited supply, are unable to receive their expected airdropped quantity. The batch refund functionality ensures that these participants receive appropriate reimbursement for their contributions.

name: Happy Bunny x IO Smart Contract
shortDescription: The Happy Bunny x IO smart contract is an ERC721 standard contract specifically developed for the latest NFT collection resulting from the collaboration between Imaginary Ones and a clothing business. This trial smart contract encompasses various features that enhance the functionality and engagement of the collection.
description:
The Happy Bunny x IO smart contract is an ERC721 standard contract specifically developed for the latest NFT collection resulting from the collaboration between Imaginary Ones and a clothing business. This trial smart contract encompasses various features that enhance the functionality and engagement of the collection.

One of the key features of the Happy Bunny x IO smart contract is the auction mint functionality. This feature enables participants to acquire NFTs through an auction process, creating an exciting and competitive environment for collectors. Participants can place bids and compete to become the proud owners of these unique Happy Bunny x IO NFTs.

Additionally, the smart contract incorporates a presale buy feature, allowing interested individuals to purchase NFTs before the official public sale. This exclusive opportunity enables early supporters and enthusiasts to secure their desired NFTs from the Happy Bunny x IO collection.

The public buy feature within the smart contract provides an accessible avenue for anyone to acquire these delightful NFTs. Users can participate in the public sale by purchasing NFTs directly from the available supply, ensuring widespread access to the Happy Bunny x IO collection.

To optimize the supply management, the smart contract includes the mintRemainingSupply functionality. This feature allows the minting of any remaining supply from the original 1001 NFTs, ensuring that no valuable NFTs go unused or unclaimed.

Furthermore, the burnRemainingSupply functionality offers a means to remove any remaining supply from circulation, providing flexibility and control over the scarcity and distribution of the Happy Bunny x IO NFTs.

name: Duckie Land Marketplace Smart Contract
shortDescription: The Duckie Land Marketplace smart contract is a trial ERC721 standard contract specifically designed for the trading and selling of NFTs within the Duckie Land ecosystem. This smart contract introduces a range of features that empower users to engage in buying, selling, and trading their unique Duckie Land NFTs.
description:
The Duckie Land Marketplace smart contract is a trial ERC721 standard contract specifically designed for the trading and selling of NFTs within the Duckie Land ecosystem. This smart contract introduces a range of features that empower users to engage in buying, selling, and trading their unique Duckie Land NFTs.

One of the key features of the Duckie Land Marketplace smart contract is the ability to update the listing price of NFTs. This feature enables users to adjust the price at which they wish to sell their NFTs, providing flexibility in the marketplace and adapting to changing market conditions.

The createToken function allows users to create new NFTs within the Duckie Land ecosystem. By leveraging this functionality, users can mint their own unique Duckie Land NFTs, adding to the diversity and richness of the marketplace.

To facilitate immediate sales, the createMarketItem function enables users to create and list their NFTs for sale on the marketplace right after creation. This feature streamlines the process of selling NFTs and provides sellers with an efficient way to connect with potential buyers.

For users who wish to resell NFTs they have previously purchased, the resellToken function comes into play. This functionality allows users to list their owned NFTs on the marketplace, giving other users the opportunity to acquire these coveted assets.

To facilitate seamless transactions, the createMarketSale function enables users to purchase NFTs that are listed on the marketplace. Users can browse the available listings, select their desired NFTs, and initiate the purchase process, creating a vibrant and active marketplace for Duckie Land NFTs.

The smart contract also includes functions to retrieve various types of information. The fetchMarketItems function allows users to retrieve all unsold market items, providing transparency and visibility into the available NFTs on the marketplace. The fetchMyNFTs function enables users to retrieve the NFTs they have purchased or currently own, allowing for easy management of their NFT portfolio. Lastly, the fetchItemsListed function provides users with a comprehensive view of the items they have listed for sale on the marketplace.
